en: For behold, the Lord GOD of hosts is taking away from Jerusalem and from Judah support and supply, all support of bread, and all support of water;
zh: 看哪！主萬軍之耶和華，快要從耶路撒冷和猶大， 除掉人所倚靠的和所倚賴的，就是眾人所倚靠的糧， 眾人所倚賴的水；

en: the mighty man and the soldier, the judge and the prophet, the diviner and the elder,
zh: 除掉勇士和戰士、 審判官和先知、 占卜的和長老、

en: the captain of fifty and the man of rank, the counselor and the skillful magician and the expert in charms.
zh: 五十夫長和尊貴的人、 謀士和有技藝的工人， 以及精通法術的。

en: And I will make boys their princes, and infants shall rule over them.
zh: 我必使孩童作他們的領袖， 使嬰孩管轄他們。

en: And the people will oppress one another, every one his fellow and every one his neighbor; the youth will be insolent to the elder, and the despised to the honorable.
zh: 人民必互相壓迫， 人欺壓人，也欺壓自己的鄰舍； 年輕人要欺凌老年人， 卑賤人必欺凌尊貴人。

en: For a man will take hold of his brother in the house of his father, saying: "You have a cloak; you shall be our leader, and this heap of ruins shall be under your rule";
zh: 人若在父家裡，拉住自己一個兄弟，說： “你有一件外衣，你就作我們的官長吧！ 這敗落的事就歸你的手處理。”

en: in that day he will speak out, saying: "I will not be a healer; in my house there is neither bread nor cloak; you shall not make me leader of the people."
zh: 那時，那人必高聲說： “我不作醫治你們的人 ， 因為我家裡沒有糧食，也沒有外衣， 你們不要立我作人民的官長。”

en: For Jerusalem has stumbled, and Judah has fallen, because their speech and their deeds are against the LORD, defying his glorious presence.
zh: 耶路撒冷敗落，猶大傾倒， 是因為他們的舌頭和行為都敵對耶和華， 惹怒了他那充滿榮光的眼目。

en: For the look on their faces bears witness against them; they proclaim their sin like Sodom; they do not hide it. Woe to them! For they have brought evil on themselves.
zh: 他們面上的表情指證他們的不對； 他們像所多瑪一般宣揚自己的罪惡， 並不隱瞞； 他們有禍了， 因為他們自招禍害。

en: Tell the righteous that it shall be well with them, for they shall eat the fruit of their deeds.
zh: 你們要告訴義人，他們必得福樂， 因為他們必享自己行為所結的果子。

en: Woe to the wicked! It shall be ill with him, for what his hands have dealt out shall be done to him.
zh: 惡人卻有禍了，他們必遭災難， 因為他們必按自己手所作的得報應。

en: My people- infants are their oppressors, and women rule over them. O my people, your guides mislead you and they have swallowed up the course of your paths.
zh: 至於我的子民，孩童欺壓他們， 婦女管轄他們； 我的子民啊！那引導你們的，使你們走錯了路， 並且混亂了你們所走的方向。

en: The LORD has taken his place to contend; he stands to judge peoples.
zh: 耶和華起來辯論， 站著審判人民。

en: The LORD will enter into judgment with the elders and princes of his people: "It is you who have devoured the vineyard, the spoil of the poor is in your houses.
zh: 耶和華必審問他子民中的長老和領袖，說： “那吞盡葡萄園的，就是你們； 從貧窮人那裡掠奪的，都在你們家中。”

en: What do you mean by crushing my people, by grinding the face of the poor?" declares the Lord GOD of hosts.
zh: 主萬軍之耶和華說： “你們為甚麼壓迫我的子民， 搓磨貧窮人的臉呢？”

en: The LORD said: Because the daughters of Zion are haughty and walk with outstretched necks, glancing wantonly with their eyes, mincing along as they go, tinkling with their feet,
zh: 耶和華又說： “因為錫安的女子高傲， 走路挺直頸項，媚眼看人， 俏步徐行， 用腳發出叮噹聲。

en: therefore the Lord will strike with a scab the heads of the daughters of Zion, and the LORD will lay bare their secret parts.
zh: 因此，主必使錫安的女子頭頂長出禿瘡； 耶和華又使她們露出前額。”

en: In that day the Lord will take away the finery of the anklets, the headbands, and the crescents;
zh: 到那日，主必除掉她們華美的腳釧、髮網、月牙圈、

en: the pendants, the bracelets, and the scarves;
zh: 耳墜、手鐲、蒙臉的帕子、

en: the headdresses, the armlets, the sashes, the perfume boxes, and the amulets;
zh: 頭飾、腳環、華帶、香盒、符囊、

en: the signet rings and nose rings;
zh: 戒指、鼻環、

en: the festal robes, the mantles, the cloaks, and the handbags;
zh: 美服、外衣、錢袋、

en: the mirrors, the linen garments, the turbans, and the veils.
zh: 鏡子、細麻襯衣、頭巾、蒙身帕子。

en: Instead of perfume there will be rottenness; and instead of a belt, a rope; and instead of well-set hair, baldness; and instead of a rich robe, a skirt of sackcloth; and branding instead of beauty.
zh: 必有腐臭代替馨香， 繩子代替腰帶， 光禿代替美髮， 麻衣繫腰代替美服， 烙痕代替美貌。

en: Your men shall fall by the sword and your mighty men in battle.
zh: 你的男丁要倒在刀下， 你的勇士必死在戰場。

en: And her gates shall lament and mourn; empty, she shall sit on the ground.
zh: 錫安的城門必悲哀哭號， 錫安被掠奪，成了一片荒涼後，必坐在地上。
